post.summary: Create a new API key (Admin only)

name.description: Descriptive name for the API key

key.description: The raw API key (only shown once)

post.description: Logout the current user by deleting the refresh token matching the request's IP address and user agent

401.description: Unauthorized - Access token is missing or invalid

get.summary: Get member detail (includes user info and permissions)

post.summary: Add a user to the project

userId.description: Users.id of the user to add

post.summary: Remove a member from the project
Change a member's role in the project
Override member permissions (grant or deny specific project permissions)
Create a new project permission definition (Admin only)

key.description: Permission key using dot notation (e.g. task.create)

post.summary: Update a project permission definition (Admin only)
Delete a project permission definition (Admin only)

404.description: Project not found or not a member

ownerId.description: Defaults to current user if omitted

post.summary: Star a project (mark as important for current user)

get.summary: Get all statuses of a project (ordered by position)

post.summary: Create a new status in the project
Reorder statuses by providing an ordered list of IDs

orderedIds.description: Status IDs in the desired order

post.summary: Assign (or replace) members on a task

memberIds.description: List of Members.id to assign. Pass empty array to unassign all.

post.summary: Mark a task as completed (Leader only)
Change the status of a task
Move a task (drag & drop) — update status and reorder both source and target columns

newStatusId.description: Status ID of the target column (can be same as current for reorder-only)

targetOrderedIds.description: Ordered task IDs in the target column after drop (must include the moved task)

sourceOrderedIds.description: Ordered task IDs remaining in the source column after removing the moved task (omit if same-column reorder)

permissions.description: List of permission IDs to assign

tags.name: Project Permissions
tags.description: Manage project-level permission definitions (Admin only for write operations)
